title: Sculk Infection
description: Adds new sculk-themed content into the game!
body:
## Sculk Infection

_This mod works on NeoForge (1.21) & Forge (1.20) via [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector/versions)! Just make sure to place [Forgified Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api/versions) in your mods folder instead of Fabric API._

This mod adds three new _advanced_ sculk-themed mobs, some sculked versions of existing mobs, and some new blocks and items! Below is a panel summarizing the major features added.

The goal of this mod is to increase sculk presence in the game. All of the new entities spawn _outside_ of the Deep Dark biome, but still below deepslate.

You can report bugs and find more info at: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-sculk-worm)


Fabric API is required for this mod to work.

![New Content: Sculked versions of existing mobs. A new special entity called the Watcher which will infect and spread sculk throughout the caves. It has 150HP and does 11 damage. A new worm entity called the Arbiter which will hunt players underground, and acts as the second phase of the Watcher. It has 200HP and does 18 damage. A new moving block called Crulk which will alert Watchers and Arbiters. Improved Warden behavior. A new throwable weapon called the Sonic Bomb. A new helmet that allows players to sense vibrations. A new AOE weapon called the Pocket Watcher.](https://i.imgur.com/1awJxYY.png)


**Loot Information:**

Sculk Traps, Worm Slime, and Crulk can be obtained via Silk Touch

Echo Shells and Sculk Sludge can be mined regularly, but Sculk Sludge must be uninhabited

Worm Mucus drops from Arbiters

Watcher Tendrils drop from Arbiters which were previously Watchers



**Config Information:**

worms_grab - allows Arbiters grab players

watchers_max_crulk - determines how many Crulk can a single Watcher summon

crulk_rarity - value between 0 and 100; 100 disables natural crulk altogether

watcher_added_rarity - value between 0 and 100; 100 disables watchers altogether

infected_zombies_all_miners - should all infected zombies be given pickaxes?

sculk_crown_feels_players - allows the sculk crown to reveal other players

pocket_watcher_attacks_players - the pocket watcher will attack other players


**Finally, here are some videos I made showcasing the mod and its updates:
